attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SPTI.TIINV as BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
,SPTI.TIIDTE as BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT
,SPTI.TINPAS as BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
,SPTI.TIACBR as BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
,SPTI.TIMCID as BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID
,COALESCE (NACNC.BK_CISCO_TRVL_NW_COMPLIANCE_CD,EPTI.CTN_Compliance,'UNKNOWN')  as BK_CISCO_TRVL_NW_COMPLIANCE_CD /* Reference check in R10 */
,COALESCE (NACR.BK_AIR_COMPLIANCE_REASON_CD , EPTI.AIR_COMPLIANCE,'UNKNOWN')  as AIR_COMPLIANCE_CD /*Reference check in R10 */
,case when SPTI.TIRFLG = 'R' then 'REFUND'
	     when SPTI.TIRFLG = 'E' then 'EXCHANGE'
	     when SPTI.TIRFLG = 'U' then 'UNMATCHED REFUND'
	     when SPTI.TIRFLG = 'P' then 'PARTIAL REFUND'
	     when SPTI.TIRFLG = 'F' then 'FULL REFUND'
	     when (SPTI.TIRFLG is null  or SPTI.TIRFLG = ' ') and SPTI.TIODTE<>'01/01/1990' (date, format 'mm/dd/yyyy') then 'REFUND'
           when (SPTI.TIRFLG is null  or SPTI.TIRFLG = ' ') and SPTI.TIODTE='01/01/1990' (date, format 'mm/dd/yyyy') then 'NOT REFUND/EXHANGE'
	     else SPTI.TIRFLG end as REFUND_OR_EXCHANGE_CD /* Logic Change in R10 */
,SPTI.TISTDT as TRAVEL_DT
,SPTI.TIVENT as TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD
,SPTI.TITAMT as INVOICE_REPORTING_AMT /* changed name to INVOICE_REPORTING_AMT from  TRANSACTION_REPORTING_AMT in R10 */
,COALESCE ( NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY , -999) as TRAVELER_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY
,COALESCE ( NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' ) as REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD
,COALESCE ( NARFT.BK_REASON_FOR_TRAVEL_CD ,EPTI.CUSTOM_FIELD_11,'UNKNOWN') as BK_REASON_FOR_TRAVEL_CD /* Added EPTI.CUSTOM_FIELD_11 in R10 */
,COALESCE ( NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ,'UNKNOW') as FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
,COALESCE ( NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK' ) as BK_FINANCIAL_DEPT_COMPANY_CD
/* New columns in R10 */
,COALESCE (SPTI.TICRS ,'UNK')	as	AMEX_GDS_CD                                                                  	
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TICLNT ,'UNKNOW')	as	AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID 
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TIACCT	,'UNKNOWN') as	AGENCY_CUSTOMER_ID 
,SPTI.TIBDTE	as	AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING_DT  
,SPTI.TIAFAR	as	BASE_FLIGHT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT 
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TIAGCD ,'=')	as	BOOKING_AGENCY_ID 
,SPTI.TIBAGN	as	BOOKING_AGENT_ID 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIENDT ,cast('1900-01-01' as date))	as	TRAVEL_RETURN_DT  
,SPTI.TIAIR	as	COMPLETE_AIR_ITINERARY_DESCR 
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TICSDI ,'=')	as	FLIGHT_DOMESTIC_INTL_CD 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIEXRT ,0)	as	REPORTED_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RT 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIIFOP ,'=')	as	FORM_OF_PAYMENT_CD 
,SPTI.TIFFAR	as	HGHST_AIR_FARE_CMPRSN_RPTG_AMT 
,SPTI.TICSLF	as	LWST_AIR_FARE_CMPRSN_RPTG_AMT 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIINVT ,'=')	as	TRAVEL_INVOICE_BILLING_TYPE_CD 
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TIMPAS ,0) 	as	MAXIMUM_PASSENGER_NUM_INT  
,COALESCE ( SPTI.TIPPD ,'=')	as	TICKET_PREPAID_FLG 
,COALESCE ( NICL.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' ) as	BK_LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD  
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIPPCD  ,'=')	as	INVOICE_PRMRY_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD 
,SPTI.TIPASS	as	TRAVELER_NAME  
,SPTI.TIPUBF	as	PUBLISHED_FARE_LOCAL_AMT 
,SPTI.TIREAS	as	FARE_SAVINGS_EXCEPTION_CD 
,case when SPTI.TITKTT=1 then 'ELECTRONIC' when SPTI.TITKTT=0 then 'PAPER' else 'UNKNOWN' end  as TICKET_TYPE_CD 
,SPTI.TITRCD	as	SPECIAL_FARE_NUM 
, COALESCE ( NATFT.BK_AMEX_TRANSACTION_FEE_TYP_CD,SPTI.TITRFE,'UNK' ) as AMEX_TRANSACTION_FEE_TYPE_CD 
,SPTI.TITRNR	as	MAXIMUM_TRANSACTION_INT_NUM   
,SPTI.TIVENN	as	AGENCY_ASSIGNED_VENDOR_NUM  
,COALESCE (NICT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, SPTI.TISCCD,'UNK') as BK_ISSUING_ISO_COUNRY_CD 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TIPNR ,'UNKNOWN') 	as	AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TISPCD ,'=')	as	INVOICE_SCNDRY_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD 
,SPTI.TIOAMT 	as	INVOICE_LOCAL_AMT 
,SPTI.TIACOM	as	AGNCY_AIR_FARE_CMMSSN_RPTG_AMT 
,COALESCE (SPTI.TITTAX ,0)	as	TOTAL_TAX_REPORTING_AMT  
,case when (SPTI.TIEXTN is null or SPTI.TIODTE is null or SPTI.TIOINV is null ) then 'N' else 'Y' END as REFUND_ROLE 
,SPTI.TITKTN	as	INVOICE_TRANSACTION_TICKET_NUM  
,SPTI.TIEXTN	as RU_ORIGINAL_TRX_TICKET_NUM 
,SPTI.TIODTE	as RU_ORIGINAL_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT 
,SPTI.TIOINV	as RU_ORIGINAL_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
/* */	
	,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
	,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_INVOICE SPTI 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POST_TRAVEL_INVOICE EPTI
 ON 	(SPTI.TIIDTE = EPTI.TIIDTE  
			 AND SPTI.TIMCID = EPTI.TIMCID  
			AND SPTI.TIACBR = EPTI.TIACBR  
			AND SPTI.TIINV =EPTI.TIINV  
			AND SPTI.TINPAS =EPTI.TINPAS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
		( select  CAST(BK_EMPLOYEE_ID AS INTEGER)  as BK_EMPLOYEE_ID_INT ,  CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
 			from 	$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV 
			WHERE 
			UPPER ( BK_EMPLOYEE_ID ) (CASESPECIFIC) = LOWER (BK_EMPLOYEE_ID )   (CASESPECIFIC) 
			AND END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'  	
			QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  CAST(BK_EMPLOYEE_ID AS INTEGER) 
									ORDER BY CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY  ASC)  =1
		) NCWP
	ON NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID_INT = cast ( EPTI.EMPLID as integer)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY NIC
	ON SPTI.TICCUR = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_REASON_FOR_TRAVEL NARFT
	ON EPTI.CUSTOM_FIELD_11 = NARFT.BK_REASON_FOR_TRAVEL_CD
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	ON ( NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE= SUBSTR( EPTI.DEPARTMENT_CODE,1,3) 
		AND NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SUBSTR( EPTI.DEPARTMENT_CODE,4,6) 
		)
/* New in R10 */
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICL
	ON ( SPTI.TIOCUR =  NICL.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE   
          and NICL.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOC
	ON  SPTI.TISCCD = ETCISOC. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICT
	on ETCISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRANSACTION_FEE_TYPE NATFT
  ON ( SPTI.TITRFE = NATFT.BK_AMEX_TRANSACTION_FEE_TYP_CD) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AIR_COMPLIANCE_REASON NACR
 	ON (NACR.BK_AIR_COMPLIANCE_REASON_CD = EPTI.AIR_COMPLIANCE) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRVL_CISCO_NW_COMPLIANC NACNC
     ON (NACNC.BK_CISCO_TRVL_NW_COMPLIANCE_CD = EPTI.CTN_COMPLIANCE)
